title: 2 Terminology
body_text:
2	Terminology
2.1	Definitions
2-Step Security
2-step security is a type of step-up authentication that is added to an application. To log in to an application that is protected by 2-step security, a user must enter the one-time password from their registered 2-step security token.
2-Step Security Token
A 2-step security token is a device or application that generates a random one-time password that is recognized by applications that are protected by 2-step security.
Alert
An Alert is an automated text or email that is sent to a customer regarding the activity on their account.
Business Taxes
Business Taxes allows your financial institution to submit CRA business tax filings and payments electronically and to view filings and remittance history in
PaymentStream
Direct Administration.
Client Centre
The Client Centre is a digital portal that provides secured access to Central 1âs applications and to information and news about our products and services.
Client Centre Users
Client Centre Users log in to the Client Centre to access certain applications. Client Centre Users canât manage CPS Admin Security Officers or other Client Centre Users.
CPS Admin
The Central Portal System (CPS) Admin application is used to add, edit, and delete Client Centre Users and CPS Admin Security Officers.
CPS Admin Security Officer
CPS Admin Security Officers use CPS Admin or the User Management application to add, edit, and delete Client Centre Users. They can also delete and modify (with some exceptions) other CPS Admin Security Officers via the User Management application. CPS Admin Security Officers also use the Client Centre to log in to certain applications.
PAN
A Primary Account Number (PAN) is a 16-digit financial institution and customer identification number embossed on the face of a debit card.

PaymentStream
AFT allows users to create AFT Transactions and upload AFT files.
PaymentStream
Direct
PaymentStream
Direct is a user interface that provides access to Central 1âs Payments products,
MemberDirect

system support features, and related administration functions via a single sign-on to the Client Centre.
Step-up Authentication
Step-up authentication is any additional identity verification (e.g., a 2-step security token) required to validate a userâs access to a higher security level.
User Management
User Management is an application used to add, edit, and delete Client Centre Users. It is also used to edit and delete other CPS Admin Security Officers and to manage 2-step security tokens. Eventually, User Management will replace CPS Admin.
END
